passive.name: Doom 'n Gloom
passive.description: Vex periodically becomes empowered, causing her next basic Ability to fear enemies and interrupt dashes. Whenever a nearby enemy dashes, Vex applies a mark that can be consumed for bonus damage that also reduces the cooldown of her empowered state.

wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Passive - Doom:}} Periodically, {{ci|Vex}} empowers her next basic ability to {{tip|knockdown|knock down}} and briefly {{tip|flee|fear}} enemies hit.
wiki_detail.blurb2:
{{sbc|Innate - Gloom:}} Nearby enemies that {{tip|dash}} or {{tip|blink}} become marked with ''Gloom'' for a few seconds. '''Vex's''' next basic attack or basic ability hit will consume the mark to deal {{as|'''bonus''' magic damage}} and {{sti|cdr|reduce}} ''Doom's'' cooldown.
''{{ai|Looming Darkness|Vex}}'' will also inflict ''Gloom'', but cannot detonate it.
wiki_detail.description:
{{sbc|Passive - Doom:}} Periodically, '''Vex''' empowers her next [[champion ability|basic ability]] to {{tip|knockdown|knock down}} and {{tip|fear}} enemies hit for {{pp|0.75 to 1.5 for 4|1;6;9;13}} seconds, during which they are {{tip|slow|slowed}} by {{pp|type=distance from '''Vex'''|60 to 99 for 11|250 to 800|key=%|formula=60% + 3.9% for every 55 units away from Vex}}. If ''{{ai|Looming Darkness 2|Vex|Looming Darkness}}'' triggers ''Doom'', enemies hit will {{tip|flee}} from the epicenter instead.
''Doom's'' {{sti|cooldown}} resets upon [[death|respawning]].
wiki_detail.description2: {{sbc|Innate - Gloom:}} Nearby enemy {{tip|champions}} and {{tip|monsters}} that {{tip|dash}} or {{tip|blink}} will be marked with ''Gloom'' for 6 seconds. '''Vex's''' next [[basic attack]], which becomes {{tip|projectile|non-projectile}}, or basic ability hit against an enemy with ''Gloom'' will detonate the mark. ''{{ai|Looming Darkness|Vex}}'' will also inflict ''Gloom'', but cannot detonate it.
wiki_detail.description3: ''Gloom's'' detonation deals {{pp|40 to 150|color=magic damage}} {{as|(+ 25% AP)}} {{ccs|{{as|'''bonus''' magic damage}}|magic}} and refunds 25% of ''Doom's'' cooldown. Against non-champions, this instead deals {{pp|40 to 60 for 5|1;6;9;13;16|key=%}} damage and refunds 10% of ''Doom's'' cooldown.
wiki_detail.callforhelp:
|flavorsound = {{sm2|Vex_Original_P1_1.ogg}} ('''Doom''' charged) "Ugghh..."
{{sm2|Vex_Original_P2_1.ogg}} ('''Gloom''' triggered) "Bring it down a notch."
wiki_detail.notes:
* ''Gloom'' will mark {{ui|Rift Herald}} and {{ui|Rift Scuttler}} when they use their dashes.
* ''Gloom'' can mark {{tip|clone|clones}}, but not other {{tip|pet|pets}}.
* ''Gloom's'' mark has a very brief cooldown and refreshes on subsequent dashes or blinks nearby enemies use.
* ''Gloom's'' mark duration will refresh to {{fd|0.5}} seconds when '''Vex''' starts an attack windup against a target that has a mark which is about to expire.
* ''Gloom'' will mark enemies even if they are {{tip|untargetable}}.
* ''Gloom'' will mark enemies that are inside the detection radius when they blink, but will not mark those that blink inside from far away.{{bug|2}}
* ''Doom's'' cooldown starts as soon as the basic ability is cast.
* Non-champions (e.g. {{ui|Rift Scuttler}}) are not {{tip|knockdown|knocked down}} by the fear-empowered ability.{{bug|2}}
* {{tip|Spell shield}} will block all of ''Doom's'' effects but not ''Gloom's'' empowered attack nor mark.
* Nearby enemies that become displaced do not count for being marked by ''Gloom''.
* '''Vex's''' basic abilities use a different icon when ''Doom'' is ready:
** [[File:Vex Mistral Bolt 2.png|20px|border]] Mistral Bolt
** [[File:Vex Personal Space 2.png|20px|border]] Personal Space
** [[File:Vex Looming Darkness 2.png|20px|border]] Looming Darkness

Q.name: Mistral Bolt
Q.description: Launch a damaging missile that accelerates mid-flight.
Q.tooltip:
Vex launches a wave of mist that deals {{ qdamagecalc }} magic damage. After a delay, the wave becomes smaller and faster.

Consumes Gloom on enemies hit.{{ spellmodifierdescriptionappend }}

wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Active:}} {{ci|Vex}} launches a wave of mist in the target direction that deals {{as|magic damage}} to enemies hit. After a short delay, the wave accelerates but also narrows.
wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Active:}} '''Vex''' launches a wave of mist in the target direction that deals {{as|magic damage}} to enemies hit. After travelling 500 units, the wave accelerates but also narrows itself.

W.name: Personal Space
W.description: Gain a shield and damage nearby enemies.
W.tooltip:
Vex gains {{ shieldcalc }} Shield for {{ shieldduration }} seconds and emits a shockwave that deals {{ wdamagecalc }} magic damage.

Consumes Gloom on enemies hit.{{ spellmodifierdescriptionappend }}

wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Active:}} {{ci|Vex}} emits a shockwave, dealing {{as|magic damage}} to nearby enemies and {{tip|shield|shielding}} herself for a short time.
wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Active:}} '''Vex''' emits a shockwave around her before the cast time, dealing {{as|magic damage}} to nearby enemies and granting herself a {{tip|shield}} for {{fd|2.5}} seconds.
wiki_detail.leveling:
{{st|Shield Strength|{{ap|50 to 150}} {{as|(+ 75% AP)}}}}
{{st|Magic Damage|{{ap|80 to 240}} {{as|(+ 30% AP)}}}}
wiki_detail.callforhelp:
|notes        = 
* ''Personal Space'' can be buffered {{fd|0.1}} seconds before it comes off cooldown or becomes available otherwise.
* '''Vex''' can move during ''Personal Space's'' cast time.

E.name: Looming Darkness
E.description: Summon a damaging and slowing zone that applies Gloom to enemies.

wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Active:}} {{ci|Vex}} tosses her ''Shadow'' to explode at the target location, dealing {{as|magic damage}} and {{tip|slow|slowing}} enemies hit for a short time. The explosion widens based on cast distance.
wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Active:}} '''Vex''' tosses her ''Shadow'' to explode at the target location, dealing {{as|magic damage}} to enemies hit and {{tip|slow|slowing}} them for 2 seconds. The explosion's radius increases based on cast distance.
wiki_detail.description2: Killing an enemy with ''Looming Darkness'' refunds 10% of {{ai|Doom 'n Gloom|Vex|Doom's}} {{sti|cooldown}}, increased to 25% for champion kills.
wiki_detail.description3: ''Looming Darkness will cast at max range if cast beyond that.''
wiki_detail.effect radius: {{tip|cr|icononly = true}} {{pp|type = cast distance|200;200+13;200+13*2;200+13*3;200+13*4;200+13*5;200+13*6;200+13*7;300|0;X;X;X;X;X;X;X;800|formula=200 +13 per X cast distance. ''This is capped at 300 effect radius.''}}

R.name: Shadow Surge
R.description: Fire a missile that marks an enemy champion.  Recast to dash to them and deal damage.

wiki_detail.blurb:
{{sbc|Active:}} {{ci|Vex}} sends her ''Shadow'' in the target direction that deals {{as|magic damage}} to enemies hit. ''Shadow'' stops upon hitting an enemy {{tip|champion}}, marking and {{tip|true sight|revealing}} them for a few seconds.
''Shadow Surge'' can be recast while the target is marked.
wiki_detail.blurb2: {{sbc|Recast:}} '''Vex''' {{tip|dashes}} towards the marked target. Upon arrival, the mark is consumed to deal {{as|magic damage}}.
wiki_detail.blurb3: If the target dies within a few seconds of being marked, '''Vex''' can cast ''Shadow Surge'' again within some time.
wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Active:}} '''Vex''' sends her ''Shadow'' in the target direction that grants {{tip|sight}} around its {{tt|trajectory|Does not see into bush or across terrain}} and deals {{as|magic damage}} to enemies hit.
wiki_detail.description2: ''Shadow'' stops upon hitting an enemy {{tip|champion}} to mark them for 4 seconds, during which they are {{tip|true sight|revealed}}. ''Shadow Surge'' can be recast while the target is marked.
wiki_detail.description3: {{sbc|Recast:}} '''Vex''' {{tip|dashes}} towards the marked target with {{tip|displacement immunity}}. Upon arrival, she consumes their mark and deals {{as|magic damage}}.
wiki_detail.leveling3: {{st|Magic Damage|{{ap|150 to 350}} {{as|(+ 50% AP)}}|Total Magic Damage|{{ap|75+150 to 175+350}} {{as|(+ {{ap|20+50}}% AP)}}}}
wiki_detail.description4: If the target dies within 6 seconds of being marked, '''Vex''' can cast ''Shadow Surge'' again within 12 seconds at no cost after {{fd|0.5}} seconds.
wiki_detail.callforhelp:
|notes        = 
{{Effect at cast time end}}
* '''Vex's''' dash will track the target if they change locations.
** She will not stop tracking the target until she reaches them, as there is no maximum tracking distance.
* ''Shadow Surge'' grants sight of the area along its path for {{fd|{{tt|0.4|Estimated}}}} seconds each.
* ''Shadow Surge'' cannot be recast while {{tip|ground|grounded}} or {{tip|root|rooted}}, or if the target is {{tip|untargetable}}.
* ''Shadow Surge'' may also be recast if the target died to the ability.
* The following table refers for interactions while '''Vex''' is dashing:
** All movement spells are disabled during the first {{fd|0.25}} seconds of the dash.
{{ct|attack=false|move=false|cast=false|items=true,,,interrupts|consume=true|spells=true,interrupts,true,true,false|interrupts=death}}
